meta.title: Request Availability - Farm El Baya
meta.description: Send your dates for a direct farm stay request at the Baya Room, Farm El Baya in Testour. One private room, direct rates from 180 DT/night.

hero.heading: Request your farm stay.
hero.subhead: There is one private room on the farm - the Baya Room. Send your dates, get the best available fit within 24 hours, and confirm directly with Mahdi before any deposit.

form.success: Your request has been sent. Mahdi will be in touch via WhatsApp or email within 24 hours. We look forward to welcoming you.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at contact@farmelbaya.com
form.payment: No online payment is taken here. Your stay is settled on arrival - Tunisian guests by cash or bank transfer, international guests by cash or an easy Wise transfer.
form.deposit: A 30% deposit confirms your booking - by bank transfer or a Wise link Mahdi shares after agreeing your dates. The balance is paid on arrival.
